core_principles: Function over Form: Every pixel must serve the game or the admin control.
Touch-First (Kiosk): Buttons must be miss-proof. 44px is for mice; 80px+ is for drunk thumbs.
High Contrast: Low light environments (bars/cafes) demand max legibility.
Tactile Feedback: UI should feel mechanical. Press states are mandatory.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Oswald' for all titles, game scores, and board names. Uppercase preferred for H1/H2.
usage_rules.body: Use 'DM Sans' for instructions, player names, and admin tables.
usage_rules.numbers: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all pricing, timers, and raw stats.

colors.rules: No gradients. Solid colors only. 'Brand' color (Amber) is used sparing for 'Unlock', 'Active', or 'Winner' states. Red is strictly for 'Stop', 'Lock', or 'Time's Up'.

kiosk.container: w-full h-screen overflow-hidden bg-background text-foreground flex flex-col
kiosk.spacing: p-8 or p-12 for main containers. Keep edge padding massive.

admin.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-6
admin.card_density: Compact. Use 'space-y-2' inside cards. No massive padding like Kiosk.
admin.navigation: Sidebar or Topbar with distinct 'Active' state (Amber underline or border).

styles.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all border-2 border-primary-foreground/10 uppercase font-heading tracking-wide
styles.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-border hover:border-primary hover:text-primary text-foreground uppercase font-heading
styles.kiosk_action: h-32 text-4xl border-4 border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:border-brand-primary transition-colors uppercase font-oswald

Card.styles: bg-card text-card-foreground border-2 border-border shadow-none rounded-sm
Card.kiosk_card: bg-zinc-900/50 border-2 border-zinc-800 hover:border-brand-primary hover:bg-zinc-900 transition-all cursor-pointer group relative overflow-hidden

Input.styles: h-14 bg-zinc-900 border-2 border-zinc-700 focus:border-brand-primary focus:ring-0 text-xl px-4 rounded-sm font-mono placeholder:text-zinc-600

icons.usage: Use thick strokes. No thin elegant icons.

images.usage: Subtle texture for Admin Sidebar or Header

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Oswald' font for all large text. It is critical for the 'Industrial' look.
For the Kiosk Locked Screen: Use a full-screen layout with the concrete texture as a subtle background overlay.
Admin Dashboard must be dense. Do not use the Kiosk 'huge button' style there.
Game Logic: State management is key. Ensure 'Locked' -> 'Setup' -> 'In-Game' -> 'Finished' flow is robust.
Use 'grid-cols-subgrid' if needed for complex admin tables alignment.
CRITICAL: Dark Mode is default. Add 'dark' class to html/body.
ALL interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

do_not: Use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl (stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md).
do: Use uppercase for buttons and headers.
Add 1px borders to almost everything to define structure.
